steps.title: LLM Provider
steps.subtitle: Which AI provider will power your agent?

fields.label: OpenRouter API Key
fields.description: One key, all models. Recommended for most users.

fields.label: OpenAI API Key
fields.description: GPT models. Also enables voice transcription.

fields.label: Anthropic API Key
fields.description: Claude models.

fields.label: Google AI Studio API Key
fields.description: Gemini models.

fields.label: Groq API Key
fields.description: Fast inference. Also enables voice transcription.

fields.label: DeepSeek API Key
fields.description: DeepSeek models.

fields.label: Mistral API Key
fields.description: Mistral models.

fields.label: xAI API Key
fields.description: Grok models.

fields.label: Together AI API Key
fields.description: Together AI models.

fields.label: Fireworks AI API Key
fields.description: Fireworks AI models.

fields.label: Kimi API Key
fields.description: Kimi Coding models.

fields.label: Moonshot API Key
fields.description: Moonshot AI (Kimi) models.

fields.label: Venice AI API Key
fields.description: Privacy-focused AI models.

fields.label: Cloudflare AI API Key
fields.description: Cloudflare AI models.

fields.label: Z.AI API Key
fields.description: Z.AI models.

fields.label: Generic LLM API Key
fields.description: Fallback key used if no specific provider key is set.

fields.label: AWS Access Key ID
fields.description: For AWS Bedrock models.

fields.label: AWS Secret Access Key
fields.description: For AWS Bedrock models.

fields.label: AWS Region
fields.description: AWS region for Bedrock.

steps.title: Model Selection
steps.subtitle: Which model should your agent use?

fields.label: Primary Model
fields.description: The main model for conversations. Format: provider/model-name

fields.label: Heartbeat Model
fields.description: Cheap model for periodic check-ins. Optional — saves cost on background tasks.

fields.label: Sub-agent Model
fields.description: Model for delegated sub-tasks. Optional — defaults to primary model.

fields.label: Fallback Models
fields.description: Comma-separated list of fallback models if primary is unavailable.

fields.label: Image Analysis Model
fields.description: Vision model for image analysis. Defaults to primary model.

steps.title: Chat Channel
steps.subtitle: How will you talk to your agent?

fields.label: Telegram Bot Token
fields.description: Get this from @BotFather on Telegram.

fields.label: Telegram Owner ID
fields.description: Your numeric user ID. Get it from @userinfobot on Telegram.

fields.label: Discord Bot Token
fields.description: From the Discord Developer Portal.

fields.label: Discord Owner ID
fields.description: Your Discord user ID. Enable Developer Mode, right-click your name, Copy User ID.

fields.label: Slack Bot Token
fields.description: Bot token from your Slack app.

fields.label: Slack App Token
fields.description: App-level token for Socket Mode.

fields.label: Slack Owner ID
fields.description: Your Slack user ID.

steps.title: Security Tier
steps.subtitle: How much power should your agent have?

fields.label: Security Tier
fields.description: Controls your agent's capabilities. Start at 0, unlock more as you gain trust.

options.label: Tier 0 — Personal Assistant
options.description: Web, memory, read/write, cron. Safe default.

options.label: Tier 1 — Capable Agent
options.description: + curated shell (find, git, wc, sort, uniq)

options.label: Tier 3 — Operator
options.description: Applies Tier 2, guides you to SSH for the rest

steps.title: Optional Extras
steps.subtitle: Fine-tune your setup. All optional — skip if unsure.

fields.label: Agent Name
fields.description: Display name for your agent.

fields.label: Timezone
fields.description: IANA timezone for cron scheduling and timestamps.

fields.label: Brave Search API Key
fields.description: Enables the web_search tool. Without this, web search calls will fail.

fields.label: Brave Search Mode
fields.description: Search result format.

options.label: LLM Context — grounded snippets with source metadata

fields.label: Embedding Model
fields.description: Override the default embedding model for semantic memory.

fields.label: Light Heartbeat Context
fields.description: Skip injecting bootstrap files during heartbeat/cron turns to save tokens.

options.label: Off — full context on every turn

fields.label: Deepgram API Key
fields.description: Dedicated voice transcription provider. Only needed if your LLM provider doesn't support audio.

fields.label: Gateway Token
fields.description: Authentication token for the gateway. Auto-generated if not set.

fields.label: Extra Exec Commands
fields.description: Comma-separated binary names in /data/bin/ to add to exec allowlist (Tier 0-1 only).

fields.label: Extra Environment Keys
fields.description: Comma-separated env var names to pass through to the gateway process.

fields.label: Tool Observer
fields.description: Send tool call events to a Telegram topic or Discord thread for monitoring.

fields.label: Observer Chat ID
fields.description: Chat/channel ID to send observer events to. Defaults to owner ID.

fields.label: Observer Thread ID
fields.description: Telegram topic or Discord thread ID for observer events.

fields.label: Observer Verbosity
fields.description: How much detail to include in observer events.
